meaning: n.(墨西哥和北美平原的)野马,<美俚>海军行伍出身的军官
examples: He laughed and applauded as the Mustang accelerated down Main.
Menacing looking Ford Mustang police car spotted in Colorado, USA.
In 1964 the Ford motor company came out with a car they called the mustang.
The redesigned Mustang and Taurus each won their respective segments in their first year out of the box.
Cessna Aircraft used Dassault's software to design a new entry-level business jet, the Citation Mustang.
